intro: A mysterious letter arrived on your doorstep this morning!
It must be delivered to Clover the Bunny on Sunny Hill.
Will you carry it through the Whispering Forest?

entry: The trees are full of secrets...
Look around — some friends might need your help before we go on!
butterflyIntro: Oh no! A butterfly is tangled in the vines!
butterflyWrong_hard: Oops! Pulling too hard might hurt her little wings.
butterflyWrong_away: Let's go back and help her.
butterflySuccess: You freed her so gently! The butterfly flutters free!
She dances around you to say thank you!
acornsIntro: Oh dear! Sammy the Squirrel dropped all her acorns!
Can you tap each one to count them, [NAME]?
acornsSuccess: You found all 6 acorns! Sammy does a happy little dance!
She says you have the sharpest eyes in the whole forest!

arrival: We made it to Sunny Hill, [NAME]!
There's Clover, waiting in the sunshine!
delivery: A letter? For me? Oh how wonderful!
Oh, [NAME]... it's a drawing of us together!
This is the most beautiful thing I have ever seen.
Thank you so much for bringing it all this way!
celebration: You did it, [NAME]! What an amazing adventure!
You are the kindest, bravest friend in the whole world!
